eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Inyo, CA; at 7:13 PM on JUL 20, 2026 Effective until 7:13 PM JUL 21, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Prepare to evacuate due to an active wildfire.  Residents with large animals and those requiring additional time should evacuate now. Prepare to evacuate due to an active wildfire.  Residents with large animals and those requiring additional time should evacuate now.
